channel.title: ICYMI Law — News-like Link Feed
channel.description: Popular news-like links shared recently by legal-type folks.

item.title: Trump's HHS abandons threat to withhold Medicare and Medicaid funding over trans care
item.description:
NPR has learned that the Department of Health and Human Services will not be finalizing its most aggressive attempt to end gender-affirming care for youth nationally.

🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 449 · likes: 1465

item.title: 12 states sue to block Paramount Skydance from buying Warner Bros.
item.description:
The Democratic attorneys general allege that the deal, which would create a news and entertainment behemoth, violates antitrust law and would harm competition in their states.

🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 294 · likes: 1215

item.title: Read the Judge’s Ruling on Trump’s IRS Lawsuit
item.description:
A federal judge said in a scathing ruling that President Trump’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service was an improper exercise in self-dealing.

🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 257 · likes: 963

item.title: ICE Agent Kills Person in Vehicle in Biddeford, Maine, State Officials Say (Gift Article)
item.description:
The shooting occurred in Biddeford, south of Portland. It was the second death in a week involving an Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent firing into a vehicle.

🔥🔥 · reposts: 352 · likes: 699

item.title: 19 Questions the Attorney General Needs to Answer
item.description:
Todd Blanche may have impressed President Donald Trump enough to earn a nomination to permanently lead the Justice Department, but the acting US attorney general made disturbing departures from the ag...

🔥🔥 · reposts: 278 · likes: 778

item.title: Nigel Farage: The mysterious crypto firm backed by Reform's biggest donor
item.description:
Tether is a giant in crytocurrency, an industry that Nigel Farage believes the UK should be embracing.

🔥 · reposts: 248 · likes: 481

item.title: Opinion | Welcome to the Golden Age of the Crone (Gift Article)
item.description:
A new generation is not willing to settle for being invisible.

🔥 · reposts: 162 · likes: 585

item.title: Fulton County’s Battle for Ballots: A Primer
item.description:
The Justice Department now must defend a search warrant built on recycled fraud claims, strained statutory theories, and glaring omissions.

🔥 · reposts: 184 · likes: 435

item.title: Nearly 200 Economists and Tech Leaders Warn of A.I. Threats (Gift Article)
item.description:
A letter calls for policymakers to do more to understand and respond to potential disruptions from artificial intelligence.

🔥 · reposts: 148 · likes: 506

item.title: First the £10 pint, now the £6.50 flat white: coffee industry faces inflationary pressures
item.description:
From harvests dampened by El Niño to wage and tax rises, getting coffee beans from crop to cup costs more than ever

🔥 · reposts: 102 · likes: 528

item.title: Opinion | Why We’re Dismantling the ICC
item.description:
America never agreed to a world tribunal that can override our own courts and the Constitution.

🔥 · reposts: 139 · likes: 410

item.title: Trump-Appointed Judge Reluctantly Grants Dismissal of Proud Boys Case
item.description:
Judge Timothy J. Kelly, a federal judge in Washington, noted that he had little choice but to accept the Trump administration’s move to end the case.

🔥 · reposts: 144 · likes: 337

item.title: Graham Platner was an unforced error – the left has lessons to learn | Osita Nwanevu
item.description:
Many imagined his buff, gruff and tattooed traits would help him connect with working-class men. But this logic was flawed

🔥 · reposts: 80 · likes: 455

item.title: UK must cap political donations to stop the rich buying influence | Heather Stewart
item.description:
If Keir Starmer won’t act then his successor should – by restricting the power of a small group of mega-donors

🔥 · reposts: 124 · likes: 343

item.title: Wagner’s Remnants Are Running an Opioid Empire in the Center of Africa
item.description:
Russia absorbed much of the mercenary group, but several hundred have used the painkiller tramadol to build a new haven in the Central African Republic.

🔥 · reposts: 145 · likes: 281

item.title: Opinion | This Is One of the Hardest Jobs in America. Millions Are Doing It Alone. (Gift Article)
item.description:
Behind closed doors, millions of Americans are stepping into one of the hardest roles they’ll ever take on: caring for their aging parents.

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 351 · likes: 1222

item.title: Blanche Stares Down Confirmation Hurdle: Lingering G.O.P. Doubts
item.description:
Key Republicans on the Judiciary Committee could push for concessions from Todd Blanche, in line to be attorney general, though they did not appear in revolt.

🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 367 · likes: 896

item.title: June heatwave killed up to 440 people a day in England and Wales, data suggests
item.description:
Extreme temperatures in May and June led to about 2,700 lost lives in total with climate crisis adding 3C to 4C

🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 309 · likes: 828

item.title: Britain’s biggest community solar farm forced to shut over grid overload fears
item.description:
Timing of Devon switchoff ‘could not be worse’, says board, as members face an estimated £2m in lost revenue

🔥🔥 · reposts: 248 · likes: 543

item.title: Jayson Conner, 48, and Jeffrey Newman, 58, Die; Gave Thousands of Backpacks to Those in Need (Gift Article)
item.description:
The couple, who died within a few days of each other, provided needed supplies, like socks and wet wipes, to people living on New York City’s streets.

🔥🔥 · reposts: 137 · likes: 567

item.title: Britain’s cars and SUVs are growing bigger – but there is a way to stop this deadly ‘carspreading’ | Christian Wolmar
item.description:
Larger vehicles crowd our roads and are far more dangerous to pedestrians. Let’s curb them before they do even more damage, says says transport commentator Christian Wolmar

🔥 · reposts: 131 · likes: 365

item.title: An artist brought 'I.C.E. pops' to a Texas campus. The show was shut down in days
item.description:
The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that administrators are questioning what art can — and can't — be seen on campus.

🔥 · reposts: 108 · likes: 278

item.title: Times Journalists Subpoenaed as Trump Escalates Pressure on Media
item.description:
The Justice Department is seeking to compel testimony from reporters who wrote about the new Air Force One. The Times called the move a “brazen act.”

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 1030 · likes: 2908

item.title: Lindsey Graham, longtime South Carolina senator, dies at 71, his office says
item.description:
Graham, who was first elected to the House in 1994 and the Senate in 2002, had been running for reelection this year.

🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 658 · likes: 2730

item.title: New Mexico says US Justice Dept hindering probe of former Epstein ranch

item.description:
The Justice Department is seeking to compel testimony from reporters who wrote about the new Air Force One. The Times called the move a “brazen act.”

item.title: Largest housing affordability bill in decades becomes law without Trump's signature
item.description:
President Trump refused to sign the bill without Congress first passing his sweeping voter ID bill.

item.title: Witnesses to fatal Houston ICE shooting challenge agency's account, lawyer says

item.title: Trump moved to cut funding for ICE body cameras and reduced oversight
item.description:
Administration opposed efforts last year to expand use of cameras by immigration agents and cut oversight staffing

item.title: Republicans ask WNBA to protect Caitlin Clark from possible ‘racially motivated’ attacks
item.description:
Eleven Republican politicians have written to the WNBA asking the league to protect Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark from ‘multiple attacks’ on court

item.title: Plan to ease rules on mailing guns could help company Trump Jr. has stake in
item.description:
President Donald Trump’s eldest son is a key player in GrabAGun, a company that hopes to dominate internet firearms sales.

reposts: 209 · likes: 400

item.title: The Iran war has pushed some countries away from oil and toward clean energy
item.description:
The new round of bombing in the Middle East has underscored the precarity of relying on fossil fuels. The war is speeding up the global transition to EVs, solar, and batteries, experts say.

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 1134 · likes: 3908

item.title: Police investigate £500,000 Reform donations from mother of fraudster who backed Farage
item.description:

item.title: Migrants who saw man killed by ICE in Houston say he did not ram officers
item.description:
